title: Explainable LOB Feature Library for Short-Horizon Crypto Perps
hypothesis: Stable order-book and trade features can forecast short-horizon perp returns well enough to improve maker quote skew or avoid adverse-selection windows.
signal_definition: Compute normalized LOB imbalance, OFI-style pressure, spread, trade intensity, and volatility-state features at event or 1-second cadence; convert the model score into a signed short-horizon alpha.
entry_rule: For research, enter or skew quotes only when signed score exceeds a pre-registered quantile threshold and spread/liquidity filters pass.
exit_rule: Exit after the forecast horizon, score decay, inventory cap breach, or adverse volatility-state transition.
sizing_rule: Map absolute score to a capped target weight; reduce size during high spread, high VPIN, or low depth states.
validation_plan: Purged time-series split by day or week
Compare maker-only and conservative taker sensitivity
Report fill rate, adverse-selection loss, fees, and spread capture
expected_failure_modes: Feature importance transfers poorly from Binance to OKX
High turnover loses to fees and missed fills

title: Funding/Basis Stability-Gated Carry
hypothesis: Funding carry is more robust when entered only during stable basis regimes and when one-step funding forecasts do not indicate imminent reversal.
signal_definition: Estimate expected funding, spot-perp basis z-score, time to funding, and recent funding persistence; produce a carry score net of estimated fees and hedge drift.
entry_rule: Enter long spot/short perp or perp-neutral proxy when expected net funding exceeds cost threshold and basis volatility is below a pre-registered cap.
exit_rule: Exit on forecast funding reversal, basis blowout, max holding time, liquidation-buffer compression, or negative net carry after costs.
sizing_rule: Target notional by inverse volatility and liquidation buffer; cap per-symbol and total funding exposure.
validation_plan: Cost-aware PnL with explicit funding cashflows
Stress funding reversal and basis crash windows
Check ct_val provenance before any parent gate discussion
expected_failure_modes: Forecast timing leaks next funding print

title: Funding-Window Adverse-Selection Filter
hypothesis: Perp funding windows and high funding-fee magnitudes identify periods when maker quotes should widen, reduce size, or pause because informed trading risk is higher.
signal_definition: Create a funding-cycle phase feature, funding magnitude percentile, spread percentile, and trade-intensity state; output a risk multiplier for market-making strategies.
entry_rule: This is a risk filter: apply to existing maker quoting when funding phase and toxicity features exceed thresholds.
exit_rule: Return to normal quoting after the funding-risk window ends and spread/trade-intensity conditions normalize.
sizing_rule: Multiply base size by a risk-state factor from 0 to 1; widen spread in warning states.
validation_plan: Replay market maker with and without funding-window filter
Measure adverse selection, fill rate, spread capture, and opportunity cost
Pre-register funding window lengths to avoid threshold mining
expected_failure_modes: Filter removes profitable inventory mean reversion
Venue-specific funding calendar effects are weak on OKX

title: Conservative Cointegration Pairs Baseline
hypothesis: Cointegration pairs can be tested as a conservative baseline, but promotion should require CPCV and must beat naive OHLCV/funding screens after costs.
signal_definition: Select pairs from a liquid perp universe using rolling cointegration quality and half-life filters; trade z-score deviations only during stable regimes.
entry_rule: Enter dollar-neutral pair when z-score exceeds a pre-registered threshold and half-life/liquidity gates pass.
exit_rule: Exit near zero z-score, on half-life break, max holding time, or hard z-stop.
sizing_rule: Dollar-neutral or beta-neutral sizing with inverse volatility caps.
validation_plan: Use purged pair selection and trading windows
Report n_trials honestly for threshold and universe search
Require DSR/PSR review before any parent integration
expected_failure_modes: Short borrow/funding and fee drag overwhelms spread convergence
